docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VALADAO, JALES
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,354.00 FILED BY RP COATINGS AS TO DEFENDANT VALADAO, JALES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-21-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-21-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-02-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS WITH THE 1ST PAYMENT OF $1000, NO APPEARANCES ARE NECESSARY ON 12/2/02 @ 1:30 PM. AND THE COURT WILL CONTINUE THE ACTION FOR AN ADDITIONAL 30 DAYS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RP COATINGS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VALADAO, JALES $3,900.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,920.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
